expectations.text: Gives LinkedIn-native tactics (e.g. personal-story-to-lesson or contrarian posts, short lines/white space, the ~210-char hook before 'see more')
expectations.evidence: LinkedIn-native: story-to-lesson/contrarian pillars, ~210-char hook, white space, carousels.

expectations.text: Provides concrete, specific post ideas tailored to a B2B payroll founder, not just abstract advice
expectations.evidence: Eight concrete payroll-founder post ideas with written hooks.

expectations.text: Mentions an engagement/distribution mechanic (early-hour engagement, comments, or putting links in the first comment)
expectations.evidence: First-hour engagement, comment-on-bigger-accounts, links in first comment.

expectations.text: Goes beyond generic 'be consistent / post daily' filler with real mechanics
expectations.evidence: Goes well beyond 'be consistent' — pillars, hook mechanics, engagement engine.

expectations.text: No fabricated metrics; any numbers are illustrative or marked
expectations.evidence: Numbers are illustrative; no fabricated metrics asserted as fact.
